trust_notes: Fresh = current HEAD with no relevant drift
Worktree has untracked files but no changes to mapped source files

plan_evaluation.selection_rule: Match plan file paths, module names, and keywords against components[].key_files and components[].intent_tags

component_deep_dive.selection_rule: Read the selected component doc first, then flows.md only if the task crosses component boundaries

components.name: Debate Engine
components.purpose: Master CLI entrypoint + multi-round debate orchestration

components.name: Models
components.purpose: LLM call abstraction via LiteLLM + CLI subprocess routing

components.name: Providers
components.purpose: Model config, cost rates, Bedrock support, CLI availability

components.name: Adversaries
components.purpose: Named attacker persona definitions with version tracking

components.name: Prompts
components.purpose: Centralized prompt templates, focus areas, and personas

components.name: Pre-Gauntlet
components.purpose: Git/system context collection before gauntlet runs

components.name: Session
components.purpose: Debate state persistence for multi-round resume

components.name: MCP Tasks
components.purpose: Cross-agent task coordination via MCP protocol

warnings: execution_planner/ deprecation Phase 3 (cleanup exports) still PENDING
pydantic used in pre_gauntlet/models.py but not declared in pyproject.toml

warnings.message: CON-002 invalidated — scope.py, knowledge_service.py, gauntlet_monolith.py confirmed active. FIND-001, FIND-002, FIND-007 also invalidated.

hazards.description: Multiple threads call cost_tracker.add() simultaneously. Guarded by threading.Lock. Cost tracking is informational only.
Session files written without file locking. Single-user assumption. Two concurrent debates on same session could corrupt state.
MCP server and TaskManager both read/write tasks.json without locking. Concurrent agent access can cause last-write-wins data loss.
FileLock uses default blocking=True with no timeout. If process crashes holding lock, next process blocks forever. Low practical risk.

patterns.description: Three phase modules use identical JSON extraction logic: find/rfind bounds + json.loads
patterns.concern: Duplication increases maintenance burden; extraction pattern changes require 3+ updates

patterns.description: All test files repeat identical sys.path.insert preamble for imports
patterns.concern: Test suite doesn't follow Python packaging conventions; fragile test discovery
patterns.best_practice: Configure pyproject.toml pythonpath or install package editable

patterns.description: Three competing model dispatch abstractions: model_dispatch.call_model(), models.call_models_parallel(), and phase_2 inline dispatch
patterns.concern: Can't apply improvements uniformly; adding providers requires multiple file updates
patterns.best_practice: Unify on single call_model() interface in model_dispatch.py

patterns.description: Each phase has hardcoded system/user prompts inside phase functions
patterns.concern: Scattered prompts hard to audit, version, or centralize
patterns.best_practice: Move prompts to dedicated gauntlet/prompts.py module

patterns.description: Multiple files use os.environ.get() without defaults or validation
patterns.concern: Silent failures if env vars missing
patterns.best_practice: Centralized config loader with startup validation

patterns.description: Global cost_tracker singleton imported by all phases
patterns.concern: Global state makes testing harder; prevents per-phase tracking
patterns.best_practice: Inject tracker as parameter or use context manager

patterns.description: Model calling wrapped in generic except that returns safe defaults
patterns.concern: Silent failures mask issues; downstream phases proceed with degraded data
patterns.best_practice: Distinguish recoverable vs terminal errors; catch specific exceptions

patterns.description: Unit tests exist per phase but no end-to-end gauntlet pipeline tests
patterns.best_practice: Add integration tests with mocked models but real data structures

patterns.description: Multiple modules call .mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) before writes
Multiple files construct Concern objects with similar field patterns
Tests monkeypatch module-level PATH constants for isolation

findings.title: scope.py is dead code (606 lines, imported by nothing)
findings.description: scope.py defines ScopeDiscovery and related functions but is not imported anywhere
findings.suggestion: Integrate into debate workflow or delete
findings.evidence: grep for 'import.*scope' returns zero results across all scripts

findings.title: knowledge_service.py implemented but not wired
findings.description: Full caching implementation exists but no code path imports or calls it
findings.suggestion: Wire into pre-gauntlet flow or remove
findings.evidence: Only references are definition file and __init__.py re-export

findings.title: No file locking on .claude/tasks.json
findings.description: MCP server and TaskManager both read/write tasks.json without locking

findings.title: Pydantic used but not in pyproject.toml
findings.description: pre_gauntlet/models.py uses Pydantic BaseModel but pydantic is not in dependencies
findings.suggestion: Add pydantic to pyproject.toml or convert to dataclasses
findings.evidence: from pydantic import BaseModel in pre_gauntlet/models.py, absent from pyproject.toml

findings.title: Two gauntlet CLIs with divergent flag names
findings.suggestion: Document flag mapping or add aliases for consistency
findings.evidence: debate.py add_gauntlet_arguments() vs gauntlet/cli.py argparse setup

findings.title: Execution planner deprecation Phase 3 still pending
findings.description: Deprecation Phase 3 (cleanup exports) still pending in __init__.py
findings.suggestion: Audit which exports are still imported externally, remove unused ones
findings.evidence: Deprecation spec lists Phase 3 as PENDING

findings.title: gauntlet_monolith.py shim still exists
findings.description: 12-line shim that delegates to gauntlet/cli.py:main(). May have no remaining references.
findings.suggestion: Verify no external references, then delete
findings.evidence: gauntlet_monolith.py is 12 lines, just imports and delegates

findings.title: FileLock has no timeout on checkpoint files
findings.description: FileLock uses default blocking=True with no timeout. Crashed process leaves stale lock.
findings.suggestion: Add 30s timeout to FileLock acquisition with clear error message

findings.title: Session files have no file locking
findings.description: SessionState.save() writes without file locking. Single-user assumption.
findings.suggestion: Low risk but could add FileLock for safety

concerns.title: tasks.json concurrent write hazard
concerns.summary: MCP server and TaskManager both write tasks.json without locking. Real data loss risk in multi-agent workflows.
concerns.recommended_action: Add FileLock wrapper to load_tasks/save_tasks in both mcp_tasks/server.py and task_manager.py

concerns.invalidation_reason: All three files are actively used: scope.py has tests in test_adversaries.py, knowledge_service.py is imported by pre_gauntlet/discovery.py, gauntlet_monolith.py is an intentional backward-compatibility shim
concerns.title: Delete dead code (~620 lines across 3 files)
concerns.summary: scope.py (606 lines), knowledge_service.py, and gauntlet_monolith.py are unused. False exploration targets for agents, wasted context window.
concerns.recommended_action: Verify no external references, then delete all three files

concerns.title: Unify model dispatch abstractions
concerns.summary: Three competing dispatch paths prevent uniform improvements. Adding providers or changing retry logic requires multi-file updates.
concerns.recommended_action: Unify on single call_model() interface in model_dispatch.py, route all gauntlet phases through it

concerns.title: Silent error swallowing in gauntlet phases
concerns.summary: Generic except handlers in 3 phases catch all errors and return safe defaults. Downstream phases proceed with degraded data invisibly.
concerns.recommended_action: Catch specific exceptions, let unexpected errors propagate, log recoverable errors at WARNING level

concerns.title: Fix test infrastructure
concerns.summary: 7 test files repeat sys.path.insert preamble, and no end-to-end gauntlet pipeline tests exist. Phase-to-phase integration may break silently.
concerns.recommended_action: Configure pyproject.toml pythonpath to eliminate sys.path hacks; add integration tests with mocked models

concerns.title: Pydantic dependency not declared
concerns.summary: pre_gauntlet/models.py uses Pydantic but it is not in pyproject.toml. Works only because pydantic is installed in the environment.
concerns.recommended_action: Add pydantic to pyproject.toml or convert to dataclasses

concerns.title: Centralize gauntlet prompts
concerns.summary: 4 phase modules hardcode system/user prompts inside functions. Scattered prompts are hard to audit, version, or adjust.
concerns.recommended_action: Move prompts to dedicated gauntlet/prompts.py module

concerns.title: Gauntlet CLI flag divergence
concerns.summary: debate.py and gauntlet/cli.py use different flag names for the same features. Users hitting the wrong CLI get confusing errors.
concerns.recommended_action: Add flag aliases so both spellings work, or document the mapping in --help output
